text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Gag me with a spoon! I'm done for...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: My skin is a mess. I should just bag my face...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Blech! I really need to be more careful about
sunburn!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I should buy a sun hat, arm covers, and a sweet
pair of sunglasses.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Aww, but I wish I could enjoy the nice weather more... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky seems to be suffering from skin
problems.
